ddls:
CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role this permission is associated with */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the processing sequence */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, running, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES task_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task this statistic is associated with */,
  "user_time" INTEGER /* Time taken by the user in seconds */,
  "system_time" INTEGER /* Time taken by the system in seconds */,
  "total_time" INTEGER /* Total elapsed time for the task in seconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_stats_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task that depends on another task */,
  "dependent_task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task that the task depends on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_dependent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
